description: CompositionWhite tennis shoes made of high peel PU, perforated upper, phylon midsole and rubber outsole shoe care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washLook great on the tennis court in this pair of white shoes from fila. The white perforated upper ensures superior breathability and protection, while the cushioned insole, collar and tongue snugly Fit around the feet, adding to the comfort factor. The overall design of the upper promotes stability, while the lightweight phylon midsole has a greater capacity for shock absorption. The grey rubber outsole with subtle grooves enhances good grip on the tennis court, protecting your feet from injuries.
